name: Village Bakery
tagline: Award-winning hearth breads & fine pastry in Montgomery Village
seoDescription: Village Bakery is a family-owned Santa Rosa bakery and café in Montgomery Village — world-famous English muffins, rustic hearth breads, fine pastry, and custom Princess and wedding cakes, a Sonoma County landmark for 25+ years.

contact.address: 3851 Sebastopol Rd, Ste 109, Santa Rosa, CA 95407

images.heroAlt: Fresh-baked hearth bread loaves on the racks at Village Bakery

sections.heading: World-Famous English Muffins & Hand-Shaped Hearth Breads
sections.subheading: A family-owned Santa Rosa bakery and café — artisan breads, fine pastry, and custom cakes, baked fresh every morning and voted Sonoma County's Best Bakery year after year.
badges: A Sonoma County landmark for 25+ years

image.alt: Fresh-baked hearth bread loaves on the racks at Village Bakery

items.title: World-Famous English Muffins
items.description: Hand-split and griddle-toasted — the ones Sonoma County drives across town for.

items.title: Rustic Hearth Breads
items.description: Crusty artisan loaves baked daily: sourdough, country boules, baguettes, and more.

items.title: Marzipan Princess Cakes
items.description: The classic Scandinavian cake under a smooth dome of marzipan — a Village Bakery signature.

items.title: Custom & Wedding Cakes
items.description: Made-to-order cakes for weddings and celebrations, baked moist and from scratch.

items.title: Fine Pastry & Desserts
items.description: Buttery morning pastries, cookies, and a daily case full of fresh sweets.

items.title: Café Breakfast & Lunch
items.description: Sit-down café fare alongside the bakery counter, made with what comes out of the oven.

sections.heading: A Sonoma County bakery landmark
body: For more than 25 years, Village Bakery has been a fixture of Santa Rosa's Montgomery Village — a family-owned bakery and café turning out rustic, hearth-baked breads and a case full of fine pastry every single morning.

Regulars come for the world-famous English muffins and stay for the marzipan-domed Princess cakes, buttery desserts, and made-from-scratch wedding cakes. It's the kind of neighborhood bakery that's earned “Best Bakery” honors from the Press Democrat year after year.
highlights: Hand-shaped hearth breads baked fresh daily
Marzipan Princess cakes & custom wedding cakes
A Sonoma County landmark for 25+ years

sections.heading: Stop by the bakery
sections.body: Find us at 3851 Sebastopol Rd, Ste 109, Santa Rosa, CA. Call (707) 829-8101 — we're glad to help.

Regulars come for the world-famous English muffins and stay for the marzipan-domed Princess cakes, buttery desserts, and made-from-scratch wedding cakes. It's the kind of neighborhood bakery that's earned “Best Bakery” honors from the Press Democrat year after year.
